_comment: Cartas de Exploración de TI4. Fuente: PDF Player Components (oficial). 60 cartas de exploración (20 cultural, 20 industrial, 20 hazardous) + 20 frontier. Las cartas con ATTACH modifican permanentemente un planeta.

rules.exploring: Cuando un jugador toma control de un planeta que no estaba controlado, lo explora: saca 1 carta del deck correspondiente al trait del planeta (cultural/industrial/hazardous) y resuelve su efecto. Luego descarta, salvo que sea relic fragment, tenga ATTACH, o diga específicamente que se guarde.
rules.noTrait: Un planeta sin trait no puede ser explorado.
rules.multipleSimultaneous: Si un jugador gana control de múltiples planetas al mismo tiempo, elige el orden en que los explora.
rules.reExplore: Un planeta ya explorado puede volver a explorarse con Scanlink Drone Network u otras habilidades.
rules.frontierTokens: Se colocan durante el setup en todos los sistemas sin planetas (anomalías sin planeta, wormholes, espacio vacío). También en el Creuss Gate System. Los hyperlane tiles no son sistemas. Se exploran con Dark Energy Tap o por efectos de cartas/habilidades.

cards.name: Demilitarized Zone
cards.effect: Return all structures on this planet to your reinforcements. Then, return all ground forces on this planet to the space area.
cards.attachEffect: Units cannot be committed to, produced on or placed on this planet. During the agenda phase, this planet's planet card can be traded as part of a transaction.

cards.name: Dyson Sphere
cards.attachEffect: This planet's resource value is increased by 2 and its influence value is increased by 1.

cards.name: Freelancers
cards.effect: You may produce 1 unit in this system; you may spend influence as if it were resources to produce this unit.

cards.name: Gamma Wormhole
cards.effect: Place a gamma wormhole token in this system. Then, purge this card.

cards.name: Mercenary Outfit
cards.effect: You may place 1 infantry from your reinforcements on this planet.

cards.name: Paradise World
cards.attachEffect: This planet's influence value is increased by 2.

cards.name: Tomb of Emphidia
cards.attachEffect: This planet's influence value is increased by 1. If the player who has the 'Crown of Emphidia' Relic has control of this planet, they can use that relic to gain 1 Victory Point.

cards.name: Cultural Relic Fragment
cards.effect: ACTION: Purge 3 of your cultural relic fragments to gain 1 Relic.

cards.name: Abandoned Warehouses
cards.effect: You may gain 2 commodities, or you may convert up to 2 of your commodities to trade goods.

cards.name: Biotic Research Facility
cards.attachEffect: This planet has a green technology specialty; if this planet already has a technology specialty, this planet's resource and influence values are each increased by 1 instead.

cards.name: Cybernetic Research Facility
cards.attachEffect: This planet has a yellow technology specialty; if this planet already has a technology specialty, this planet's resource and influence values are each increased by 1 instead.

cards.name: Functioning Base
cards.effect: You may gain 1 commodity, or you may spend 1 trade good or 1 commodity to draw 1 action card.

cards.name: Local Fabricators
cards.effect: You may gain 1 commodity, or you may spend 1 trade good or 1 commodity to place 1 mech from your reinforcements on this planet.

cards.name: Propulsion Research Facility
cards.attachEffect: This planet has a blue technology specialty; if this planet already has a technology specialty, this planet's resource and influence values are each increased by 1 instead.

cards.name: Industrial Relic Fragment
cards.effect: ACTION: Purge 3 of your industrial relic fragments to gain 1 Relic.

cards.name: Core Mine
cards.effect: If you have at least 1 mech on this planet, or if you remove 1 infantry from this planet (placing it in your reinforcements), gain 1 trade good.
cards._clarification: The card's wording is ambiguous. Official clarification: if you have at least 1 mech, gain the benefit; otherwise, you may choose to remove 1 infantry to gain the benefit.

cards.name: Expedition
cards.effect: If you have at least 1 mech on this planet, or if you remove 1 infantry from this planet (placing it in your reinforcements), ready this planet.
cards._clarification: Same clarification as Core Mine applies.

cards.name: Lazax Survivors
cards.attachEffect: This planet's resource value is increased by 1 and its influence value is increased by 2.

cards.name: Mining World
cards.attachEffect: This planet's resource value is increased by 2.

cards.name: Rich World
cards.attachEffect: This planet's resource value is increased by 1.

cards.name: Volatile Fuel Source
cards.effect: If you have at least 1 mech on this planet, or if you remove 1 infantry from this planet (placing it in your reinforcements), gain 1 command token.
cards._clarification: Same clarification as Core Mine applies.

cards.name: Warfare Research Facility
cards.attachEffect: This planet has a red technology specialty; if this planet already has a technology specialty, this planet's resource and influence values are each increased by 1 instead.

cards.name: Hazardous Relic Fragment
cards.effect: ACTION: Purge 3 of your hazardous relic fragments to gain 1 Relic.

cards.name: Derelict Vessel
cards.effect: Draw 1 secret objective.

cards.name: Enigmatic Device
cards.effect: Place this card face up in your play area. ACTION: You may spend 6 resources and purge this card to research 1 technology.

cards.name: Gamma Relay
cards.effect: Place a gamma wormhole token in this system. Then, purge this card.

cards.name: Ion Storm
cards.effect: Place the ion storm token in this system with either side face up. Then, place this card in the common play area. At the end of a 'Move Ships' or 'Retreat' sub-step of a tactical action during which 1 or more of your ships use the ion storm wormhole, flip the ion storm token to its opposing side.

cards.name: Lost Crew
cards.effect: Draw 2 Action Cards.

cards.name: Merchant Station
cards.effect: You may replenish your commodities, or you may convert your commodities to trade goods.

cards.name: Mirage
cards.effect: Place the Mirage planet token in this system. Gain the Mirage planet card and ready it. Then, purge this card.

cards.name: Unknown Relic Fragment
cards.effect: This card counts as a relic fragment of any type.

cards.name: Dead World
cards.effect: Draw 1 relic.

cards.name: Entropic Field
cards.effect: Gain 1 command token and 2 trade goods.

cards.name: Keleres Ship
cards.effect: Gain 2 command tokens.

cards.name: Major Entropic Field
cards.effect: Gain 1 command token and 3 trade goods.

cards.name: Minor Entropic Field
cards.effect: Gain 1 command token and 1 trade good.
